title: eriogonum artificis
intro: Eriogonum artificis, also known as the artificial buckwheat clover, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Eriogonum artificis include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum artificis often involve making a tea from the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
